reviews.review_description:
It's Christmas day 2024 so I thought I'll  go and 'Jingle some bells'🤣

Well you definitely get to Jingle her bells! Sadly though you don't get to 'Jingle all the way' I wonder what the next chapter will be revealing 😂

It's made very well but sadly it is very short but for the low price it's worth every penny. I think the graphics could be be improved for the Quest 3 

Buy it!
Five stars from me
⭐ ⭐ ⭐ ⭐ ⭐
This game is fun and cute something different cute girl and great story kinda short but nice
